message.content:
Edit the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBRR-RegimeRepo.adoc` to remove dead RBRR variable documentation.

**Remove these 7 complete variable sections** (each section starts with `.RBRR_VARNAME` and ends with `|===`):

1. RBRR_REGISTRY_SERVER (lines 72-82)
2. RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES (lines 124-134) — also remove the `=== Build Configuration` heading above it (line 122) since it will have no content
3. RBRR_HISTORY_DIR (lines 136-148)
4. RBRR_MACHINE_NAME (lines 152-162) — also remove the `=== Virtual Machine Configuration` heading above it (line 150) since it will have no content
5. RBRR_VMDIST_TAG (lines 164-174)
6. RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA (lines 176-186)
7. RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE (lines 188-198)

**Also fix the RBRR_ENCLAVE_SUBNET reference** in the term_enclave_network definition (around line 208-211). The current text references `RBRR_ENCLAVE_SUBNET` which is a dead variable. Replace the reference so the definition doesn't mention a nonexistent variable. Change:
```
An isolated network connecting a bottle container to its sentry container, using the
RBRR_ENCLAVE_SUBNET
for addressing.
This network enforces strict security policies and provides the only communication path for the bottle container.
```
to something like:
```
An isolated network connecting a bottle container to its sentry container.
This network enforces strict security policies and provides the only communication path for the bottle container.
```

**Important:** Preserve all other content. Don't add comments, docstrings, or annotations. Don't modify anything else. Read the file first, then make the edits.

content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand its current structure and locate the sections that need to be removed.

content.content:
1→= Base Configuration Regime
     2→:doctype: book
     3→
     4→// tag::mapping-section[]
     5→//
     6→// Category declarations:
     7→// at_: Architectural terms
     8→// st_: Support/infrastructure terms
     9→//
    10→// Domain declaration: conf_<canonical_term>
    11→
    12→:at_bottle_container:        <<term_bottle_container,Bottle Container>>
    13→:at_sentry_container:        <<term_sentry_container,Sentry Container>>
    14→
    15→:at_bottle_service:          <<term_bottle_service,Bottle Service>>
    16→:at_bottle_service_s:        <<term_bottle_service,Bottle Services>>
    17→:at_enclave_network:         <<term_enclave_network,Enclave Network>>
    18→:at_enclave_network_s:       <<term_enclave_network,Enclave Networks>>
    19→:at_nameplate:               <<term_nameplate,Nameplate>>
    20→:at_nameplate_s:             <<term_nameplate,Nameplates>>
    21→:at_rbm_system:              <<term_rbm_system,RBM System>>
    22→:at_container_registry:      <<term_container_registry,Remote Container Registry>>
    23→:st_container:               <<term_container,Container>>
    24→:st_container_s:             <<term_container,Containers>>
    25→:st_subnet:                  <<term_subnet,Subnet>>
    26→:st_gateway:                 <<term_gateway,Gateway>>
    27→:st_published_image_s:       <<term_published_image,Published Images>>
    28→
    29→// end::mapping-section[]
    30→
    31→== Base Configuration
    32→
    33→=== Network Configuration
    34→
    35→.RBRR_DNS_SERVER
    36→[cols="1,4"]
    37→|===
    38→|Purpose |Specifies the upstream DNS resolver for all
    39→{at_bottle_service_s}.
    40→Each
    41→{at_sentry_container}
    42→uses this DNS server to resolve domain names.
    43→The
    44→{at_bottle_container}
    45→never directly accesses this: the
    46→{at_sentry_container}
    47→acts on its behalf when permitted.
    48→
    49→|Required |No
    50→
    51→|Format |Valid IPv4 address
    52→
    53→|Example |export RBRR_DNS_SERVER := 8.8.8.8
    54→|===
    55→
    56→=== System Configuration
    57→
    58→.RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH
    59→[cols="1,4"]
    60→|===
    61→|Purpose |Defines the directory containing all {at_nameplate} definitions
    62→
    63→|Required |No
    64→
    65→|Format |Relative path from {at_rbm_system} root
    66→
    67→|Default |"nameplates"
    68→
    69→|Example |export RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH := recipes/nameplates
    70→|===
    71→
    72→.RBRR_REGISTRY_SERVER
    73→[cols="1,4"]
    74→|===
    75→|Purpose |Specifies the container registry server for retrieving {st_published_image_s}
    76→
    77→|Required |No
    78→
    79→|Format |Fully-qualified domain name with optional port
    80→
    81→|Example |export RBRR_REGISTRY_SERVER := registry.example.com:5000
    82→|===
    83→
    84→=== Registry Configuration
    85→
    86→.RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER
    87→[cols="1,4"]
    88→|===
    89→|Purpose |Specifies the GitHub username or organization that owns the container registry namespace. This determines the registry path where {st_published_image_s} are stored.
    90→
    91→|Required |Yes
    92→
    93→|Format |Valid GitHub username or organization name
    94→
    95→|Example |export RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER := bhyslop
    96→|===
    97→
    98→.RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME
    99→[cols="1,4"]
   100→|===
   101→|Purpose |Defines the repository name within the GitHub container registry. Combined with RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER, this forms the complete registry path for storing {st_container} images.
   102→
   103→|Required |Yes
   104→
   105→|Format |Valid GitHub repository name
   106→
   107→|Example |export RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME := recipemuster
   108→|===
   109→
   110→.RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV
   111→[cols="1,4"]
   112→|===
   113→|Purpose |Path to environment file containing GitHub credentials for API and {at_container_registry} authentication. Must contain RBV_USERNAME and RBV_PAT variables.
   114→
   115→|Required |Yes
   116→
   117→|Format |Relative or absolute file path
   118→
   119→|Example |export RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV := ../station-files/secrets/github-ghcr-play.env
   120→|===
   121→
   122→=== Build Configuration
   123→
   124→.RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES
   125→[cols="1,4"]
   126→|===
   127→|Purpose |Target platform architectures for {st_container} builds. Determines which architectures are supported when building {st_published_image_s}.
   128→
   129→|Required |Yes
   130→
   131→|Format |Space-separated list of platform identifiers in os/arch format
   132→
   133→|Example |export RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES := linux/amd64
   134→|===
   135→
   136→.RBRR_HISTORY_DIR
   137→[cols="1,4"]
   138→|===
   139→|Purpose |Local directory for storing build artifacts and history from GitHub Actions workflows. Maintains records of all {st_container} builds.
   140→
   141→|Required |Yes
   142→
   143→|Format |Relative path from {at_rbm_system} root
   144→
   145→|Default |RBM-history
   146→
   147→|Example |export RBRR_HISTORY_DIR := builds/history
   148→|===
   149→
   150→=== Virtual Machine Configuration
   151→
   152→.RBRR_MACHINE_NAME
   153→[cols="1,4"]
   154→|===
   155→|Purpose |Name identifier for the Podman virtual machine instance used for {st_container} operations and {at_bottle_service} deployment.
   156→
   157→|Required |Yes
   158→
   159→|Format |Valid machine name (alphanumeric with hyphens)
   160→
   161→|Example |export RBRR_MACHINE_NAME := podman-machine-rbw
   162→|===
   163→
   164→.RBRR_VMDIST_TAG
   165→[cols="1,4"]
   166→|===
   167→|Purpose |Full container image reference for the Podman machine OS distribution. Specifies the exact version of the virtual machine image to use.
   168→
   169→|Required |Yes
   170→
   171→|Format |Complete container image reference with registry, repository, and tag
   172→
   173→|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_TAG := quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl:5.3
   174→|===
   175→
   176→.RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA
   177→[cols="1,4"]
   178→|===
   179→|Purpose |SHA256 hash of the VM filesystem layer blob. Used for image verification and ensuring consistent virtual machine deployments.
   180→
   181→|Required |Yes
   182→
   183→|Format |64-character hexadecimal SHA256 hash
   184→
   185→|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA := 6898117ca935bae6cbdf680d5b8bb27c0f9fbdfe8799e5fe8aae7b87c17728d3
   186→|===
   187→
   188→.RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE
   189→[cols="1,4"]
   190→|===
   191→|Purpose |URL to download the crane utility binary, used for copying {st_container} images between registries during VM image management.
   192→
   193→|Required |Yes
   194→
   195→|Format |Complete HTTPS URL to crane release archive
   196→
   197→|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE := https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/releases/download/v0.20.3/go-containerregistry_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz
   198→|===
   199→
   200→== Term Definitions
   201→
   202→[[term_bottle_service]]
   203→{at_bottle_service}::
   204→A complete service instance consisting of one bottle container and one sentry container, working together to provide secure functionality. Each service maintains strict file system and network boundaries while enabling controlled access to resources.
   205→
   206→[[term_enclave_network]]
   207→{at_enclave_network}::
   208→An isolated network connecting a bottle container to its sentry container, using the
   209→RBRR_ENCLAVE_SUBNET
   210→for addressing.
   211→This network enforces strict security policies and provides the only communication path for the bottle container.
   212→
   213→[[term_nameplate]]
   214→{at_nameplate}::
   215→A configuration file stored in
   216→RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH
   217→that defines all aspects of a bottle service, including its images, network settings, and security policies.
   218→Each nameplate provides a complete service specification that the RBM System can instantiate.
   219→
   220→[[term_rbm_system]]
   221→{at_rbm_system}::
   222→The complete Recipe Bottle Makefile system, consisting of the
   223→RBM Console,
   224→RBM Config Makefile,
   225→nameplates,
   226→and
   227→associated tools.
   228→This system enables secure deployment and management of containerized services.
   229→
   230→[[term_container_registry]]
   231→{at_container_registry}:: 
   232→A service that stores and provides access to published images.
   233→
   234→[[term_container]]
   235→{st_container}:: 
   236→A lightweight, standalone executable package containing all necessary components to run a service.
   237→
   238→[[term_subnet]]
   239→{st_subnet}:: 
   240→A logically visible subdivision of IP network address space.
   241→
   242→[[term_gateway]]
   243→{st_gateway}:: 
   244→A network node that serves as the entry point between two networks.
   245→
   246→[[term_published_image]]
   247→{st_published_image}:: 
   248→An image that has been uploaded to a container registry.
   249→
   250→

input.old_string:
|Example |export RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV := ../station-files/secrets/github-ghcr-play.env
|===

=== Build Configuration

.RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |Target platform architectures for {st_container} builds. Determines which architectures are supported when building {st_published_image_s}.

|Required |Yes

|Format |Space-separated list of platform identifiers in os/arch format

|Example |export RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES := linux/amd64
|===

.RBRR_HISTORY_DIR
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |Local directory for storing build artifacts and history from GitHub Actions workflows. Maintains records of all {st_container} builds.

|Required |Yes

|Format |Relative path from {at_rbm_system} root

|Default |RBM-history

|Example |export RBRR_HISTORY_DIR := builds/history
|===

=== Virtual Machine Configuration

.RBRR_MACHINE_NAME
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |Name identifier for the Podman virtual machine instance used for {st_container} operations and {at_bottle_service} deployment.

|Required |Yes

|Format |Valid machine name (alphanumeric with hyphens)

|Example |export RBRR_MACHINE_NAME := podman-machine-rbw
|===

.RBRR_VMDIST_TAG
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |Full container image reference for the Podman machine OS distribution. Specifies the exact version of the virtual machine image to use.

|Required |Yes

|Format |Complete container image reference with registry, repository, and tag

|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_TAG := quay.io/podman/machine-os-wsl:5.3
|===

.RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |SHA256 hash of the VM filesystem layer blob. Used for image verification and ensuring consistent virtual machine deployments.

|Required |Yes

|Format |64-character hexadecimal SHA256 hash

|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA := 6898117ca935bae6cbdf680d5b8bb27c0f9fbdfe8799e5fe8aae7b87c17728d3
|===

.RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE
[cols="1,4"]
|===
|Purpose |URL to download the crane utility binary, used for copying {st_container} images between registries during VM image management.

|Required |Yes

|Format |Complete HTTPS URL to crane release archive

|Example |export RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE := https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/releases/download/v0.20.3/go-containerregistry_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz
|===

content.text:
Perfect! All edits have been completed successfully. Here's a summary of what was removed and changed:

## Summary of Changes

**File:** `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/lenses/RBRR-RegimeRepo.adoc`

**Removed 7 complete variable sections:**
1. `RBRR_REGISTRY_SERVER` (was lines 72-82)
2. `RBRR_BUILD_ARCHITECTURES` (was lines 124-134) + removed "=== Build Configuration" heading
3. `RBRR_HISTORY_DIR` (was lines 136-148)
4. `RBRR_MACHINE_NAME` (was lines 152-162) + removed "=== Virtual Machine Configuration" heading
5. `RBRR_VMDIST_TAG` (was lines 164-174)
6. `RBRR_VMDIST_BLOB_SHA` (was lines 176-186)
7. `RBRR_VMDIST_CRANE` (was lines 188-198)

**Fixed the enclave network definition:**
- Changed the `term_enclave_network` definition from referencing the dead `RBRR_ENCLAVE_SUBNET` variable to a cleaner version that simply describes the network function without mentioning the nonexistent variable.

The file now contains only the active variables and maintains all other content intact with proper AsciiDoc formatting.
